descriptions: SVLz are rivals of Latin Counts per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sureños, 12st Players, Almighty Bishops, 4GMz, SVLz, Latin Kings, Two Six, 22Boys, Almighty Ambrose, La Raza, Satan Disciples, Krazy Getdown Boys, Imperial Gangsters, Maniac Latin Disciples, Spanish Gangster Disciples, Insane Deuces, Folk Nation

Grey Wolves.description: The Grey Wolves are a Turkish far-right ultranationalist and neo-fascist political movement and the youth wing of the Nationalist Movement Party (MHP). Founded by Colonel Alparslan Türkeş in the late 1960s, they engaged in urban guerrilla warfare during the late 1970s political violence in Turkey and are implicated in numerous massacres and assassinations. The organization has been banned in Azerbaijan, Kazakhstan, and France, and is active in Turkey, Northern Cyprus, Western Europe, and Central Asia.

descriptions: The Grey Wolves list Alperen Hearths as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Alperen Hearths

descriptions: Grey Wolves and Alperen Ocakları jointly protested, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: In December 2017 Grey Wolves members, among them the BBP-affiliated Alperen Ocakları, invaded the Hagia Sophia and prayed there in protest against the United States recognition of Jerusalem as capital of Israel.

edges.target: Armenian Secret Army for the Liberation of Armenia
descriptions: Grey Wolves members targeted ASALA members.
edges.evidence_quote: They mostly targeted members of the Armenian Secret Army for the Liberation of Armenia (ASALA), which attacked Turkish embassies abroad in retaliation for the Turkish state's continued denial of the Armenian genocide.

descriptions: The Grey Wolves list Islamic State as an opponent.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: Islamic State, Kurdistan Workers' Party, Kurdish Hezbollah, Raiders Organization

descriptions: The Grey Wolves list Kurdish Hezbollah as an opponent.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: Islamic State, Kurdistan Workers' Party, Kurdish Hezbollah, Raiders Organization

descriptions: The Grey Wolves list the Kurdistan Workers' Party as an opponent.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: Islamic State, Kurdistan Workers' Party, Kurdish Hezbollah, Raiders Organization

descriptions: Grey Wolves attacked HDP offices in retaliation for PKK attacks, indicating conflict with PKK.
edges.evidence_quote: On 7–8 September 2015, Turkish nationalists, including Grey Wolves members, attacked 128 offices of the pro-Kurdish Peoples' Democratic Party (HDP) across Turkey in an apparent retaliation for anti-government attacks by the Kurdistan Workers' Party (PKK).

descriptions: Grey Wolves attacked Kurdish rallies, and Turkey blamed PKK sympathizers, indicating conflict between Grey Wolves and PKK.
edges.evidence_quote: Turkey criticized the handling of the violence by the Austrian police and claimed that it was organized by PKK sympathizers.

descriptions: The Muntasir Billah Brigade has ties to the Grey Wolves.
edges.evidence_quote: Some Syrian rebel groups have ties to the Grey Wolves. One is the Muntasir Billah Brigade, another is the Turkmen Abdulhamid Han Brigade.

descriptions: Osmanen Germania BC worked as security guards for the Grey Wolves from 2014 to 2018.
edges.evidence_quote: From 2014-2018 the Osmanen Germania were an extreme right criminal gang working as security guards for the gray wolves.

descriptions: The Grey Wolves list the Raiders Organization as an opponent.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: Islamic State, Kurdistan Workers' Party, Kurdish Hezbollah, Raiders Organization

descriptions: TFN has links to the Grey Wolves.
edges.evidence_quote: Organizations such as Turkish Federation Netherlands (Turkse Federatie Nederland, TFN) and Turkish Islamic Federation (Turks Islamitische Federatie) have links to the Grey Wolves.

descriptions: Turkish Islamic Federation has links to the Grey Wolves.
edges.evidence_quote: Organizations such as Turkish Federation Netherlands (Turkse Federatie Nederland, TFN) and Turkish Islamic Federation (Turks Islamitische Federatie) have links to the Grey Wolves.

descriptions: The Turkistan Islamic Party allegedly conspired with the Grey Wolves in an assassination.
edges.evidence_quote: Youm7, an Egyptian news site picked up a document allegedly issued by the Army of Conquest (Jaish al-Fatah), which claimed that it conspired with the Turkistan Islamic Party and the Grey Wolves in the December 2016 assassination of Andrei Karlov, the Russian ambassador to Turkey.

descriptions: The PKK lists the Grey Wolves as an opponent.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Grey Wolves

descriptions: Osmanen Germania had connections with the Grey Wolves.
edges.evidence_quote: It had connections to the neo-fascist Grey Wolves .

edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , TCP , CCA

descriptions: TCC was created by former PCC leaders as a splinter group, leading to conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Marcola would eventually order the deaths of Geleião and Cesinha for having testified to the police and for creating the Terceiro Comando da Capital (Third Capital Command, TCC).

descriptions: Avalon Garden Crips is a set of Crips that joined forces with other Crips sets.
edges.evidence_quote: A mediados de 1971, los Avalon Garden Crips y más algunos sets de Crips juntaron fuerzas.

descriptions: Gowanus Boys was a constituent gang that made up the original South Brooklyn Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the gangs that made up the original South Brooklyn Boys were the South Brooklyn Devils, the Garfield Place Boys, the SB Angels, SB Diapers, the Wanderers, the Degraw St boys, the Sackett St Boys, the Butler Gents, the Gowanus Boys, the Kane St. Midgets, The Little Gents, and the Young Savages.

descriptions: Al-Nusra opposed Al-Abbas Brigade.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Al-Abbas Brigade

descriptions: Caucasus Emirate is a non-state ally of the Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies ... Caucasus Emirate

Puro Tango Blast.description: Puro Tango Blast is a loose affiliation of regionally based street and prison gangs of primarily Hispanic men from major Texas cities. Formed in the late 1980s within the Texas Department of Criminal Justice, it lacks a strict hierarchy and is classified as a security threat group. Members engage in drug trafficking, robbery, and other crimes. The organization remains active with an estimated 17,000–19,000 members.

descriptions: Gulf Cartel employs Puro Tango Blast for drug distribution.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mexican drug cartels that operate in the area are currently employing gang members to distribute drugs and conduct other criminal activities on their behalf. Among these gangs... are Puro Tango Blast (Vallucos)

descriptions: Barrio Azteca is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mexikanemi , Texas Syndicate , Barrio Azteca , Crips

descriptions: Crips is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mexikanemi , Texas Syndicate , Barrio Azteca , Crips

descriptions: Puro Tango Blast formed for protection from Mexikanemi, indicating a conflict relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Incarcerated Hispanic men from major Texas cities (including Houston , Dallas , Fort Worth , Austin ), have banded together for protection from established security threat groups like Mexikanemi and the Texas Syndicate .

descriptions: Puro Tango Blast formed for protection from Texas Syndicate, indicating a conflict relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Incarcerated Hispanic men from major Texas cities (including Houston , Dallas , Fort Worth , Austin ), have banded together for protection from established security threat groups like Mexikanemi and the Texas Syndicate .

Cannonball Motorcycle Club.description: An outlaw motorcycle club founded in Helsinki, Finland in 1991 by Jari Uotila. It has eleven chapters in Finland and Estonia with over 200 members. Designated as an organized crime group by the Finnish National Bureau of Investigation. The club briefly disbanded in 2017 due to internal disputes but resumed operations.

descriptions: Cannonball MC is allied with Hells Angels and in conflict with Bandidos (via Undertakers).
edges.evidence_quote: The vice-president of Cannonball MC, a club allied with the Hells Angels, was wounded by an Undertakers member in a shooting at restaurant on 1 April 1995

descriptions: Cannonball members were involved in a shootout with Chosen Ones MC in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: Nine motorcycle gang members were charged with various crimes, including attempted murder, after Cannonball members were involved in a shootout with rival bikers at the clubhouse of the Chosen Ones MC in Joensuu on 22 August 2020.

descriptions: Cannonball was a support club for Hells Angels from 1991 to 1996.
edges.evidence_quote: During the initial five years of its existence, Cannonball MC operated as a support club of the Hells Angels.

descriptions: Moraine MC was allied with Chosen Ones MC in the shootout with Cannonball.
edges.evidence_quote: Four members of the Chosen Ones and the allied Moraine MC were also charged in the case.

descriptions: Cannonball and Overkill were aligned against Undertakers MC during the Nordic Biker War.
edges.evidence_quote: As a Hells Angels support club, Cannonball was aligned with the HA prospect chapter Overkill MC against the Undertakers MC, a prospect club of the Bandidos, during the Nordic Biker War in the 1990s.

descriptions: Rogues Gallery was founded by former Cannonball members from the Lahti chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: The former members of this chapter then founded the Rogues Gallery gang in the city in January 2000.

descriptions: Squad 32 is a sub-division of Cannonball MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Additionally, Cannonball's sub-division, Squad 32, has six branches.

descriptions: Cannonball was in conflict with Undertakers MC during the Nordic Biker War.
edges.evidence_quote: As a Hells Angels support club, Cannonball was aligned with the HA prospect chapter Overkill MC against the Undertakers MC, a prospect club of the Bandidos, during the Nordic Biker War in the 1990s.

descriptions: Del Prete and Buonerba were allied with Mazzarella against the Paranza dei Bambini.

descriptions: Mazzarella, Del Prete, and Buonerba were allied against the Paranza dei Bambini.

descriptions: Comando Chico Bala is historically known as a rival of Liga da Justiça.
edges.evidence_quote: Milícias historicamente conhecidas como rivais da Liga da Justiça teriam sido, segundo as investigações, o Comando Chico Bala, além do grupo comandado por Jorge Babu.

Bloody Tubs.description: The Bloody Tubs were a 19th-century gang of street thugs in Baltimore and Philadelphia, formed in the mid-1850s. They worked for Nativist Know Nothing politicians to commit election fraud, using violent tactics such as dunking opponents in slaughterhouse tubs. The gang reportedly planned to assassinate President-elect Abraham Lincoln in 1860. They were broken up by police after 1870 due to public outrage.

descriptions: Bloody Tubs were allied with Dead Rabbits.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Plug Uglies, Rip Raps, Nativists, Dead Rabbits

descriptions: Bloody Tubs were allied with Plug Uglies.

descriptions: Fullerton Boys members were originally from LVM.
edges.evidence_quote: Most of its members belonged to the LVM gang, SZA gang (Sarzana) gang and some from the Wah Ching gang.

descriptions: The Popeyes enforced a policy against red-and-white color schemes on other clubs, including Black Angels MC.
edges.evidence_quote: On multiple occasions, they would forcibly tear the patches off of kuttes of said motorcyclists. Some motorcycle clubs that would be affected by the Popeyes' rules included the Zombi MC, Black Angels MC and Escape Hell MC.

descriptions: Black Angels MC is a support club of Sin City Deciples.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the group's support clubs include the Street Misfitz MC, Black Angels MC, So Solid Ryders MC, Ridin’ Like We Stole It MC, and Chauns MC.

Sombra Negra.description: Death squad based in El Salvador, composed mainly of police and military personnel acting as vigilantes targeting criminals and gang members. Active since around December 1994, it was dismantled in 1996 but resurfaced in 2014. Known for targeting Mara Salvatrucha and Mara 18 gangs, often leaving victims blindfolded and shot in the head.

descriptions: Sombra Negra hunted maras, including 18th Street.
edges.evidence_quote: Maras were hunted by death squads including Sombra Negra.

descriptions: Sombra Negra hunted maras, including Mara Salvatrucha.
edges.evidence_quote: Maras were hunted by death squads including Sombra Negra.

descriptions: Sombra Negra targets and executes members of Mara 18.
edges.evidence_quote: Apuntando a la Mara Salvatrucha y a la Mara 18

descriptions: Thirteenth Tribe merged into Hells Angels by patching over to form the Halifax chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: On 5 December 1984, the Thirteenth Tribe biker gang of Halifax led by David Carroll "patched over" to become the first Hells Angels chapter in Atlantic Canada.

descriptions: Năm Cam's organization planned to kill Tài chém, leading to conflict with his gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Năm Cam, under the guidance of Bảy Sy planned to kill Tài chém, a notorious gangster in the first district of Saigon, but the plan failed and resulted in Năm Cam being chased by Tài chém's gang brothers.

descriptions: Salakau routinely attacked 18 Sio Yi Ho as a rival gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Attacks on rival gangs such as Sakongsa, Omega and 18 Sio Yi Ho were somewhat of a routine occurrence.

descriptions: Tambov gang fought a bloody skirmish with Velikolukskaya.
edges.evidence_quote: A bloody skirmish with the Velikolukskaya gang caused Kumarin to fall into a month-long coma.

descriptions: Tambov gang initially merged into Velikolukskaya for protection.
edges.evidence_quote: the gang merged into the large criminal group Velikolukskaya

Four Corner Hustlers.description: American street gang founded in the West Garfield Park neighborhood of Chicago in the late 1960s by Walter 'King' Wheat and Freddy Gauge. Known for violence and drug trafficking, it is allied with the People Nation and Vice Lords. The gang operates in multiple U.S. cities and has over 9,000 members as of 2020.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: People Nation , Bloods , Vice Lords , Four Corner Hustlers , Latin Kings , Chicago Outfit , Libyan Arab Jamahiriya

Blue Angels Motorcycle Club.description: International outlaw motorcycle club formed in Glasgow, Scotland in 1963 by Allan Morrison and Billy Gordon. It is the oldest outlaw biker club in Europe and one of the largest in the UK, with chapters in Scotland, England, Belgium, Spain, and Germany. The club has been linked to organized crime and designated a criminal motorcycle gang by Belgian federal police.

descriptions: Garthamlock Blackhawks members joined the Blue Angels after gang wars ended.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Roadburners and Garthamlock Blackhawks gangs subsequently joined the Blue Angels.

descriptions: Blue Angels were rivals of the English Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: rivalling the English Hells Angels

descriptions: Blue Angels and Mad Dogs were in a feud after a former Blue Angels member formed the Mad Dogs.
edges.evidence_quote: A feud developed between the Blue Angels and the Mad Dogs Motorcycle Club after senior Blue Angels member Daniel Laponder broke away and formed the Mad Dogs in 2023.

descriptions: Blue Angels members forced a Mongrel Mob member to surrender his colors.
edges.evidence_quote: Four Blue Angels members ... forced a member of the Mongrel Mob to hand over his ' colours ' at his home

descriptions: Blue Angels and Nomads were in a turf war starting after Blue Angels expanded into Aberdeenshire.
edges.evidence_quote: A turf war involving the Blue Angels and the Nomads – a motorcycle club formed in Aberdeen in 1966 – started after the Blue Angels expanded into Aberdeenshire

descriptions: Blue Angels formed an alliance with Road Rats in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: The Blue Angels began associating with motorcycle clubs in England during the 1970s, forming an alliance with the Road Rats of London

descriptions: Roadburners members joined the Blue Angels after gang wars ended.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Roadburners and Garthamlock Blackhawks gangs subsequently joined the Blue Angels.

descriptions: Blue Angels were in a biker war with Satans Slaves in 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: The Blue Angels were reportedly involved in a biker war with the Tayside chapter of the Satans Slaves in 2011.

descriptions: Tribe is a support club of the Blue Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: The Tribe, the BAMC's support club , was formed in Edinburgh in November 2011

Temple Street gang.description: Street gang based in downtown Los Angeles, founded by Filipino and Mexican youths in the 1920s-1930s. Involved in murders, assaults, burglaries, drug and gun trafficking. Colors are blue and black. Allies include Sureños and Mexican Mafia; rivals include Norteños and 18th Street gang.

edges.evidence_quote: The two gangs battled with the Green Ones until 1928, when the Russo gang lost too many members and blamed the Pillow gang for betraying them.

edges.evidence_quote: Ad uccidere Graziano non sono stati i Cava, sono stati i Grasso (altra famiglia camorristica di Quindici), che vogliono scalzare i Graziano.

descriptions: Vollaro clan fought a war with Cozzilino clan in 2001-2002.
edges.evidence_quote: The Vollaro clan has fought two Cammora wars. The first between 1977 and 1997, was an internal war plagued by a score of murders and the other, in late 2001 and early 2002, was with the Cozzilino clan.

Aryan Republican Army.description: White nationalist terrorist gang that robbed 22 banks in the Midwest from 1994 to 1996. Founded in 1992 by Donna Langan and Richard Lee Guthrie Jr., the group stockpiled weapons for a race war and allegedly conspired with Timothy McVeigh. Members were arrested in 1996 after informants cooperated with the FBI.

descriptions: The Bethnal Green Mob and Hoxton Mob were allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Bethnal Green Mob who were allies with the Hoxton Mob
